items.title: Assess and lock the next launch tokenomics
items.description: Confirm the current live split, choose the next test model, and size both the token side and ETH side of opening liquidity so one buyer cannot cheaply dominate early supply.

items.title: Replay historical swaps against deeper opening liquidity
items.description: Use recorded swap fee and purchase data to estimate how pricing and supply distribution would have behaved under healthier LP configurations.

items.title: Add ownership verification to uploadAsset
items.description: uploadAsset route does not verify caller owns the artist before allowing upload.

items.title: Improve inner-circle artist onboarding reveal
items.description: Make first artist onboarding feel like treasure: pre-curated portal, artist-specific mood, and fine-tuning after the reveal instead of blank-canvas-first.
items.location: app/page.tsx, app/create/page.tsx, onboarding and theme components

items.title: Re-enable fundWallet safely for testnet rehearsal
items.description: After key rotation, restore a guarded faucet-like flow so artists and fans can transact during the rehearsal phase without unnecessary friction.

items.title: Open feedback to all fans and artists
items.description: Every fan and artist should be able to reach GOSHEESH through the chat so the rehearsal loop captures real confusion and delight.

items.title: Add tagging and per-asset splits to upload flow
items.description: Let artists tag uploads and define collaborator splits per asset, with equal split as the default and custom percentages optional.
items.location: upload flow, asset metadata, payout logic

items.title: Refresh page after new asset upload
items.description: After upload, new asset doesn't appear until manual refresh.

items.title: Implement proper LP calculation in artist/balances
items.description: lpWithdrawableUsd is hardcoded to 0; LP calculation not implemented.

items.title: Design reserve vault stewardship and sovereignty handoff
items.description: Document what stays fixed, what can be handed over later, and how reserve control, fee rights, and ownership move from stewardship to artist sovereignty.

items.title: Design wallet reload flow for rehearsal and later real money
items.description: Use faucet-style reloads on testnet now and prepare a Venmo-based reload path later so fans can keep going without friction.
items.location: wallet flow, fundWallet, future payments rail

items.title: Design toppins per-view meter with 1155 exemption
items.description: First few views are free, then a small internal toll applies per view, and ownership of the 1155 removes the toll entirely.
items.location: content playback, wallet balance, ownership checks

items.title: Add grounded chat guidance for ArtisTalks and portal navigation
items.description: Hook up a language model that is grounded in founder voice and can guide artists through ArtisTalks curriculum while helping fans and artists navigate the portal.
items.location: chat system, knowledge grounding, ArtisTalks guidance layer

items.title: Prepare clean public fork and key rotation plan
items.description: Document what survives the private rehearsal, what gets reset, and how the clean public-ready repo and key set will be created.
items.location: repo strategy, deployment process, launch ops

items.title: Implement Redis cache for purchase/1155
items.description: 5-min TTL cache for price/quote data.

items.title: Implement proper session management with Magic.link
items.description: Session handling for purchase flow.

items.title: Add playlist and play-next flow
items.description: Create a smoother media journey so fans can continue through releases without friction and the portal can guide attention more intentionally.

items.title: Explore reserve-backed borrowing as a later-stage feature
items.description: Research whether artists could later borrow against reserve value instead of draining LP, without introducing harmful complexity too early.

items.title: Add server-side treasury wallet check
items.description: Treasury API returns data to any logged-in user; UI restricts to Gosheesh. Add server-side check for defense-in-depth.

items.title: Refactor feedback submit to use authenticatedFetch
items.description: Feedback submit uses manual fetch with token; other flows use authenticatedFetch for consistency.

items.description: test feedback loop
